title: Mutation timing, accumulation and selection in the male germline shape inheritance risk for developmental disorders
summary: WGS of 168 trios + duplex sequencing of paternal sperm. Most fathers of DD children show normal sperm mutation burden. 6/127 carried early mosaic pathogenic variants (0.7-14.8% VAF) accounting for ~11% of exome pathogenic burden. Remaining risk from low-VAF mutations and age-associated accumulation. Clarifies de novo mutation origins for developmental disorders.
